task_completion.description: Verify that input processes have been configured for all three zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Emoncms 'Inputs' page. The nodes 'zone_hvac', 'zone_lighting', and 'zone_sockets' should have their 'power_w' inputs configured, indicated by a process count > 0 or active wrench icons next to them.

task_completion.description: Verify that power feeds have been created for each zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Emoncms 'Feeds' page. There should be at least 3 feeds created that track real-time power (Watts) for the HVAC, lighting, and sockets zones.

task_completion.description: Verify that kWh accumulation feeds have been created for each zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Emoncms 'Feeds' page. There should be at least 3 additional feeds created that track energy accumulation (kWh) for the HVAC, lighting, and sockets zones. The total number of feeds should be at least 6.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Building Submetering' dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Emoncms 'Dashboards' list or the dashboard editor. A dashboard explicitly named 'Building Submetering' must exist.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dashboard contains the minimum required number of widgets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Building Submetering' dashboard view or editor. Count the visual widgets (e.g., dials, bar graphs, real-time text displays). There must be at least 4 distinct widgets present.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dashboard widgets compare power and energy across the three zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the content of the widgets on the dashboard. They must display data from the feeds, showing both power (W) and energy (kWh) metrics, and include data representing the different zones (HVAC, lighting, sockets).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Emoncms web interface to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Emoncms web UI (Inputs, Feeds, Dashboards pages) rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard widgets are genuine Emoncms UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard should display actual rendered Emoncms widgets (like standard dials, feedvalue text, or multigraphs) connected to feeds, not just static HTML text typed into a basic text block to fake the appearance of a dashboard.

integrity.description: Verify that browser developer tools were not used to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane open and being used to alter DOM text (e.g., faking feed names or dashboard titles).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Emoncms nodes: 'zone_hvac', 'zone_lighting', and 'zone_sockets'. A minimum of 6 feeds must be created (2 per zone: one for power, one for kWh). A dashboard named 'Building Submetering' must be created containing at least 4 widgets that compare power and energy across the zones. Synthetic power data is approximately: HVAC at 3480W, lighting at 847W, and sockets at 1195W.
